title: Simply Craftable Elytra
description: A mod focused on making the Elytra Easily craftable for use with "Revamped Floating Islands"
body:
# Elytra Crafting Mod (Fabric 1.20.1)

## Craft Your Own Elytra!
Ever wanted a way to craft the **Elytra** instead of _finding it_? This mod lets you do exactly that!

### Best Used With:
This mod is designed to work well with:
- [**Revamped Floating Islands**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/revamped-floating-islands)
- [**Nether Floating Islands**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nether-floating-islands)

These mods change terrain generation, making the **Elytra more useful** as your primary mode of travel!

## Requirements
- **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** (Required for compatibility)
- **[Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/)** (Latest version recommended)

## Crafting Recipe
The Elytra crafting recipe uses:
-  **4 Phantom Membranes**
-  **2 Strings**
-  **1 Stick**

Check out the **Gallery** on Modrinth to see the exact crafting pattern!

## About This Mod
- This is **my first-ever mod**, and right now, it’s only available for **Fabric 1.20.1**.
- If the **community requests**, I’ll update it for more versions!
- I made this mod for **myself**, because I love the Elytra, but I’m sharing it since others might find it **useful** too!

## Open Source & License
This project is **completely open-source** and licensed under the **GNU General Public License v2 (GPL-2.0)**.
- You can freely **modify and distribute** the source code.
- Any modifications must be **released under the same GPL-2.0 license**.
- Check out the **source code and compilation steps** on the **[GitHub Page](https://github.com/JohnnYDeveloperAHK/Simply-Craftable-Elytra/tree/main)**.
